title: Digital Banking Reimagined
subtitle: Transforming Indian mobile banking with zero-to-one innovation and inclusion.
problem_statement: Existing banking apps lack intuitive design, personalized financial tools, and fail to address India's diverse user needs and digital literacy gaps.

pillars.title: Financial Security
pillars.insight: Users fear fraud, want secure transactions and clear privacy policies.

pillars.title: Digital Simplicity
pillars.insight: Complex interfaces deter new digital users and reduce adoption rates.

pillars.title: Future Growth
pillars.insight: Aspire for wealth, need accessible investment tools and guidance.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW simplify complex banking for diverse users?
HMW build trust in digital finance for new users?
HMW innovate beyond traditional banking services?

data.name: Google Pay
cons: Not a full-fledged bank, limited features.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: Time is money, I need quick, smart financial tools.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy, seeks efficient digital solutions for managing finances and investments.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I need simple banking for my business, no complications.
personas.bio: Manages a small business, needs straightforward banking, often uses cash.

insights: My current bank app is confusing.
I wish I could invest easily.
How can I grow my savings?

points.action: Replace complex forms with voice commands for transactions.
Integrate financial planning with social savings groups.
Adopt gamified rewards from gaming apps for savings.
points.benefit: Boosts engagement for routine banking tasks.

points.action: Redesign transaction history for visual spending insights.
points.benefit: Helps users understand spending patterns better.

pivot.before: Generic, feature-heavy banking apps overwhelm users with too many options.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from feature-dump to guided, personalized financial journeys, focusing on user goals and needs.
pivot.after: Intuitive, goal-oriented banking that empowers users with clear financial control.

annotations.title: Smart Balance
annotations.rationale: Clearly displays available funds, spending insights.

annotations.title: UPI Scan & Pay
annotations.rationale: Prominent, quick access for common Indian payment method.

annotations.title: Goal-Based Savings
annotations.rationale: Encourages financial planning, visual progress tracking.

data.finding: Transaction status often unclear, lacks immediate feedback.
Different sections use varied iconography and terminology.
No confirmation before critical actions like large transfers.
Limited customization options for dashboard or quick actions.
